tool_args.label: Total Revenue April 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenue of $365.4 million was $27.0 million favorable to the budget

tool_args.label: Ridership Through April 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Through April 2025, ridership was 25.0 million which was 10.0% above 2024, (13.5)% below 2019 pre-COVID levels (adjusted for the same number of workdays), and 8.5% above the budget

tool_args.label: Farebox Revenue April YTD 2025
tool_args.raw_text: farebox revenue of $209.5 million was $11.6 million higher than the budget

tool_args.label: Total Expenses April YTD 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses before non-cash liability adjustments of $796.3 million were $7.0 million or 0.9% unfavorable to the budget

tool_args.raw_text: Total headcount was 7,923 which was 170 positions lower than the budget

tool_args.label: Results based on preliminary close
tool_args.raw_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current months' actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current months' actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
payload.missing_information: Post-close adjustments not yet included in current month actuals

tool_args.label: Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio YTD April 2025 (page 4)
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date April Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio was 35.2% which was above the budget due to higher farebox revenue and lower expenses.

tool_args.label: Adjusted Cost Per Passenger YTD April 2025 (page 4)
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date April Adjusted Cost per Passenger was $25.74 which was lower than the budget due to higher ridership and lower expenses.

tool_args.label: Revenue Per Passenger YTD April 2025 (page 4)
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date April Revenue per Passenger was $8.36, below the budget due to a lower yield per passenger.

tool_args.label: Payroll Favorable Variance YTD April 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Payroll expenses were $5.3 million favorable (lower average pay rates reflecting new hires)

tool_args.label: Health & Welfare Favorable Variance YTD April 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Health & Welfare expenses were $10.3 million favorable (lower rates and vacant positions)

tool_args.label: Pensions Favorable Variance YTD April 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Pensions expenses were $3.7 million favorable due to the timing of pension payments

tool_args.label: Electric Power Unfavorable Variance YTD April 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Electric Power expenses were $2.5 million unfavorable primarily due to higher rates

tool_args.label: Materials & Supplies Unfavorable Variance YTD April 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Materials and Supplies were $7.3 million unfavorable primarily due to the timing of modifications and RCM activity for revenue fleet

tool_args.label: Other Operating Revenue Favorable Variance YTD April 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Other Operating Revenue was $6.1 million favorable to the budget primarily due to rental revenue and FEMA loss recovery revenue

tool_args.label: Farebox Revenue Favorable Variance YTD April 2025 (narrative)
tool_args.raw_text: Farebox Revenue was $11.6 million favorable to the budget due to higher paid ridership, partially offset by lower yield per passenger

tool_args.label: Adjusted performance indicators exclude non-cash liabilities
tool_args.raw_text: The Standard Farebox Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators reflect MTA-wide adopted calculations that exclude non-cash liability adjustments: Depreciation, Other Post Employment Benefits and Environmental Remediation (GASB-49).

payload.claim_text: The Standard Farebox Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators reflect MTA-wide adopted calculations that exclude non-cash liability adjustments: Depreciation, Other Post Employment Benefits and Environmental Remediation (GASB-49).
payload.description: Standard indicators exclude non-cash liability adjustments

tool_args.label: Adjusted indicators include all operating revenue and financial impacts outside management control
tool_args.raw_text: Adjusted Fare Box Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators have been adjusted for comparability between the Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad and are being presented only at the railroad operating committees. These adjustments are not being used MTA-wide. Adjustments have been made to reflect all operating revenue and significant financial impacts that are outside management's control. These adjustments include: Inclusion of Other Operating Revenue, Removal of OPEB Current Payment expenses for retirees, and Removal of the UAAL associated with the LIRR's closed pension plan.

payload.claim_text: Adjusted Fare Box Operating Ratio and Cost Per Passenger indicators have been adjusted for comparability between the Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad and are being presented only at the railroad operating committees.
payload.description: Adjusted indicators exclude certain non-controllable items and include all operating revenue
